diffs.diff:
--- a/predict.py
+++ b/predict.py
@@ -1,35 +1,19 @@
 import argparse, os, json, numpy as np, torch, torch.nn as nn

 

-class MovingAvg(nn.Module):

-    def __init__(self, kernel=25):

+class NLinear(nn.Module):

+    def __init__(self, seq_len=96, pred_len=720, n_feat=7):

         super().__init__()

-        self.kernel = kernel

-        self.avg = nn.AvgPool1d(kernel_size=kernel, stride=1, padding=0)

+        self.seq_len=seq_len; self.pred_len=pred_len; self.n_feat=n_feat

+        self.linear = nn.ModuleList([nn.Linear(seq_len, pred_len) for _ in range(n_feat)])

     def forward(self, x):

-        pad = (self.kernel-1)//2

-        front = x[:,0:1,:].repeat(1,pad,1)

-        end = x[:,-1:,:].repeat(1,pad,1)

-        x_ = torch.cat([front,x,end],dim=1)

-        x_ = self.avg(x_.transpose(1,2)).transpose(1,2)

-        return x_

-

-class DLinearCI(nn.Module):

-    def __init__(self, seq_len=96, pred_len=720, n_feat=7, kernel=25):

-        super().__init__()

-        self.decomp = MovingAvg(kernel)

-        self.linear_s = nn.ModuleList([nn.Linear(seq_len, pred_len) for _ in range(n_feat)])

-        self.linear_t = nn.ModuleList([nn.Linear(seq_len, pred_len) for _ in range(n_feat)])

-        self.n_feat = n_feat

-    def forward(self, x):

-        trend = self.decomp(x)

-        season = x - trend

+        last = x[:, -1:, :]

+        x = x - last

         outs=[]

         for c in range(self.n_feat):

-            s = season[:,:,c]

-            t = trend[:,:,c]

-            o = self.linear_s[c](s) + self.linear_t[c](t)

+            o = self.linear[c](x[:,:,c])

             outs.append(o.unsqueeze(-1))

-        return torch.cat(outs, dim=-1)

+        out = torch.cat(outs, dim=-1)

+        return out + last

 

 def main():

     ap = argparse.ArgumentParser()

@@ -43,7 +27,7 @@
     std = np.load(os.path.join(ckpt_dir,'std.npy'))

     x = np.load(os.path.join(args.data_path,'test_windows.npy')).astype(np.float32)

     xn = (x-mean)/std

-    model = DLinearCI().to(device)

+    model = NLinear().to(device)

     sd = torch.load(args.checkpoint, map_location=device)

     model.load_state_dict(sd)

     model.eval()

--- a/train.py
+++ b/train.py
@@ -50,50 +50,33 @@
 val_ds = TSDataset(val_full)

 print(f'train windows: {len(train_ds)}, val windows: {len(val_ds)}')

 

-class MovingAvg(nn.Module):

-    def __init__(self, kernel=25):

+class NLinear(nn.Module):

+    def __init__(self, seq_len=96, pred_len=720, n_feat=7):

         super().__init__()

-        self.kernel = kernel

-        self.avg = nn.AvgPool1d(kernel_size=kernel, stride=1, padding=0)

+        self.seq_len=seq_len; self.pred_len=pred_len; self.n_feat=n_feat

+        self.linear = nn.ModuleList([nn.Linear(seq_len, pred_len) for _ in range(n_feat)])

     def forward(self, x):

-        # x [B,L,C]

-        pad = (self.kernel-1)//2

-        front = x[:,0:1,:].repeat(1,pad,1)

-        end = x[:,-1:,:].repeat(1,pad,1)

-        x_ = torch.cat([front,x,end],dim=1)

-        x_ = self.avg(x_.transpose(1,2)).transpose(1,2)

-        return x_

-

-class DLinearCI(nn.Module):

-    def __init__(self, seq_len=96, pred_len=720, n_feat=7, kernel=25):

-        super().__init__()

-        self.decomp = MovingAvg(kernel)

-        self.linear_s = nn.ModuleList([nn.Linear(seq_len, pred_len) for _ in range(n_feat)])

-        self.linear_t = nn.ModuleList([nn.Linear(seq_len, pred_len) for _ in range(n_feat)])

-        self.n_feat = n_feat

-    def forward(self, x):

-        trend = self.decomp(x)

-        season = x - trend

-        # [B,L,C] -> per channel

+        # x [B,L,C], subtract last val per channel

+        last = x[:, -1:, :]

+        x = x - last

         outs=[]

         for c in range(self.n_feat):

-            s = season[:,:,c]

-            t = trend[:,:,c]

-            o = self.linear_s[c](s) + self.linear_t[c](t)

+            o = self.linear[c](x[:,:,c])

             outs.append(o.unsqueeze(-1))

-        return torch.cat(outs, dim=-1)

+        out = torch.cat(outs, dim=-1)

+        return out + last

 

 device = 'cpu'

 torch.set_num_threads(8)

-model = DLinearCI(SEQ_LEN, PRED_LEN, N_FEAT).to(device)

+model = NLinear(SEQ_LEN, PRED_LEN, N_FEAT).to(device)

 print('params:', sum(p.numel() for p in model.parameters()))

-opt = optim.Adam(model.parameters(), lr=5e-3, weight_decay=0)

+opt = optim.Adam(model.parameters(), lr=1e-3, weight_decay=0)

 loss_fn = nn.MSELoss()

 

-train_loader = DataLoader(train_ds, batch_size=32, shuffle=True, num_workers=2)

+train_loader = DataLoader(train_ds, batch_size=64, shuffle=True, num_workers=2)

 val_loader = DataLoader(val_ds, batch_size=256, shuffle=False, num_workers=2)

 

-EPOCHS = 15

+EPOCHS = 20

 sched = optim.lr_scheduler.CosineAnnealingLR(opt, T_max=EPOCHS)

 best_val = float('inf')

 log_path = os.path.join(LOG_DIR, 'metrics.jsonl')

@@ -126,11 +109,11 @@

     if vl < best_val:

         best_val = vl

-        torch.save(model.state_dict(), 'checkpoints/best.pt')

+        torch.save(model.state_dict(), 'checkpoints/best_nlinear.pt')

         patience=0

     else:

         patience+=1

 log_f.close()
